title: MFA enforced for all users
description: Screenshot or report showing multi-factor authentication is required for all user accounts in the identity provider.

title: Access control policy
description: Approved logical access control policy describing authentication, authorization, and password requirements.

title: User provisioning/deprovisioning records
description: Tickets or logs showing access is authorized on hire and removed on termination.

title: Periodic access review
description: Completed quarterly user access review with approver sign-off.

title: Administrator inventory within threshold
description: Report enumerating privileged/admin accounts demonstrating least privilege.

title: No publicly accessible storage
description: Cloud configuration report showing object storage buckets are not publicly accessible.

title: Encryption at rest enabled
description: Cloud configuration showing volumes/databases are encrypted at rest.

title: Vulnerability scan results
description: Most recent authenticated vulnerability scan report.

title: Centralized audit logging enabled
description: Configuration showing audit/activity logging is enabled and centrally collected.

title: Incident response plan
description: Approved incident response plan with roles and escalation paths.

title: Change management evidence
description: Sample of change tickets/PRs showing review and approval before deployment.

title: Branch protection enforced
description: Repository settings showing protected default branch with required reviews.

title: Vendor security reviews
description: Completed third-party/vendor security review records for critical vendors.

title: Information security policy
description: Approved and communicated information security policy.

title: Access rights review
description: Evidence of periodic review of access rights.

title: Security awareness training records
description: Completion records for security awareness training.

title: Secure authentication / MFA
description: Configuration showing MFA is enforced for system access.

title: Technical vulnerability management
description: Vulnerability scan output and remediation tracking.

title: Logging enabled
description: Configuration showing event logging is produced and protected.

title: Use of cryptography
description: Evidence of encryption in transit and at rest with key management.

title: Security risk analysis
description: Documented ePHI risk analysis.

title: ePHI encryption at rest
description: Configuration showing ePHI stores are encrypted at rest.

title: Audit controls enabled
description: Configuration showing system activity affecting ePHI is logged.

title: Authentication / MFA
description: Configuration showing authentication, including MFA, protects ePHI access.

title: Transmission security
description: Configuration showing ePHI is encrypted in transit.

title: AI policy
description: Documented and approved AI policy.

title: AI system impact assessment
description: Completed AI system impact assessment for in-scope systems.

title: AI operation and monitoring records
description: Evidence of ongoing monitoring of the AI system in operation.
